title: Bare Bones Moss Overlay
description: Change your ugly moss carpet to a super duper cool carpet with the overlay in the barebones style
body:
This texture pack makes your Moss Carpets more mossy. Optimized and pretty in a Barebones Style!



![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b0cabd7cdd3cab866d698af9fb577aef4d7b8e7.png)
